generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know? Countries investing in strategic autonomy aren't just securing their future, they're protecting their citizens' privacy. While some worry about civil liberties, the real risk comes from over-reliance on foreign tech. Our allies in Europe have shown that with the right policies, we can have both security AND freedom. #StrongerTogether #TechSovereignty
